unmatched_gold: Outdoor Noise Barrier for cooling tower noise
unmatched_pred: Providing and fixing under-deck & wall acoustic insulation as 4 mm thick sound deadener having density 900–1100 kg/m³ with minimum STC (Sound Transmission Class) 20 dB as per ASTM E-90, over which 50 mm White wool packed in readymade bag made of aluminum foil. White wool shall have density of 64 kg/m3 with tolerance as per IS: 14656/IS: 15402. Material shall have minimum NRC(Noise Reduction Coefficient) 0.70 as per ASTM C 423. The material shall have minimum STC (Sound Transmission Class) 10 dB as per ASTM E90. Base material shall have fire class A as per ASTM E 84. First layer of 4mm sound deadner shall be fixed on wall with the help of adhesive and necessary mechanical accesories and above it 50 mm thick Encapsulated bag shall be fixed with the help of screw washers and GI wire and needed mechanical accessories and the application shall be carried out strictly as per approved guidelines and instructions of the site supervisor.

Providing and fixing outdoor noise barrier with brick wall support with metal framing, including 8 mm (2 layer of 4 mm) thick sound deadener having density 900–1100 kg/m³ with minimum STC (Sound Transmission Class) 20 dB as per ASTM E-90(for 4 mm thick), over which 100 mm thick Mineral Wool of density 140 kg/m³ with minimum NRC(Noise Reduction Coefficient) 0.90 as per ASTM C 423 shall be installed, followed by a fiberglass tissue layer for moisture protection. The inner 28G Aluminum sheet facing the cooling tower shall be perforated to enhance sound absorption. The entire assembly shall be securely fixed on the brick wall structure using suitable mechanical accessories, and installation shall be carried out strictly as per approved guidelines and instructions of the site supervisor.
Structure & civil

The entire outdoor noise barrier assembly shall be securely fixed on a Brick Wall structure of atleast 100 mm thickness, To protect the noise barrier from rain and support installation of noise diffractor a canopy shall be created on top-side of noise barrier, both using suitable mechanical accessories, and installation shall be carried out strictly as per approved guidelines and instructions of the site supervisor.

Custom Fabrication and Installation of Aluminum based noise diffractors to be mounted on the top of noise barrier assembly with diffraction achieved comparable to 2 m of wall height. The diffractor shall be 0.20 meters in height and shall be able to acheive 4 dB noise reduction. It should be modular in design of width approximately 1m.

Furnish and install acoustic louvers shall be preferably made of 16 gauge galvanized steel. Louver splitter blades (baffles) shall be airfoil configuration and preferably made of 22 gauge galvanized steel. They should be packed with inert, vermin & moisture proof mineral fiber and povide STC of minimum 15 dB as per ASTM E-90. Inclusion of Bird screen on one side is preferred. The aerodynamic performance shall be 500 fpm for 0.30 i.w.g. static pressure drop and upto 1000 fpm for 1.25 i.w.g. static pressure drop.
Note: Area and rates are subject to revision.

unmatched_pred: THERMAL INSULATION

Supply, Installation of Insulation material. Thermal insulation of Ducts with low smoke/low fire propagating FM listed closed cell nitrile rubber insulation having ASTM E84 (25/50) ratings with Class 0 and UL94(V0 &HB) approvals. Insulation to be factory laminated with minimum 12 microns thick glass reinforced pure aluminium foil of 3x3 mesh pattern with min k value of 0.036 w/mK @ 24 Deg C with working temp range till 85 deg C and have μ value of 12,000 as per EN12086.  For outdoors, insulation to be factory laminated with laminated with Grey colored 400 microns/380 gsm multiple layered laminate of polymeric material reinforced with scrim with μ value of 20,000  and UV resistance as per ISO 4892-2 Method A (1000 Hrs test) and mechanical strength >5 MPa as per ASTM.

Application to be done in square box method. Good bonding Min 75 mm width alu foil to be applied at each sides. To avoid condensation, Minimum 100 mm distance to be provided between insulated surfaces/walls for ventilation. For good workmanship and lower wastage, the Installation team to be certified by Manufacturer team for proper applicaton with Min 2 day installation training to be conducted by manufacturer's person only. Adhesive to be used should be low voc and IGBC compliant and specially formulated for ducting insulation by OEM (SR 505/Duct Seal). Also, application to be done in well ventilated area with RH% below 80%. A periodic monthly site visit to be done by the manufacturer representative to ensure proper application quality. Report to be submitted to the user, pmc and consultant.

Above mentioned specifications to be backed up by Third party test certificates from foreign/nabl accredited labs and to be submitted to PMC/Consultant for the approval before material supply. A random lab test to be conducted by user for the supplied product for K value, covering thickness, and ASTM E84(25/50) certifications at foreign/nabl accredited labs. Cost for the same to be borne by the contracting agency.

Supply, Installation of Insulation material. For material integrity, the Insulation shall pass Air Erosion Resistance Test in accordance to ASTM Standard C 1071 - 05. Adhesive to be used should be low voc and IGBC compliant and specially formulated for ducting insulation by OEM(SR 505 or Equivalent). Insulation to be approved by local fire authorities. Also, application to be done in well ventilated area with RH% below 80%

The insulation material shall have water absorption of 0.2% by volume as per ASTM C 1763 ,shall have fire performance rating of 25/50 as per ASTM E 84. Density will be 40 to 60 Kg/m3 .• The insulation material shall have Microban®* an anti-microbial product, which is EPA (Environmental Protection Agency), USA Approved, as an integral part of insulation that cannot be washed off or worn off.The insulation material shall give enhanced level of protection against harmful Microbes such as fungi and mold and should confirm to ASTM G 21, UL 181 & ASTM E 2180. Water Vapor Permeability of insulation material shall be minimum 0.05 Perm-inch. without any external barrier as per ASTM E 96 Procedure A. The adhesives for the application of insulation should be of principal manufacturer. Application services to be availed from the principal insulation company and detailed report to be provided by the insulation manufacturer after installation
